description: Amara's deeper fears - vulnerability that creates connection
_philosophy: Amara's willingness to share her own fears creates safety for others to share theirs. This isn't about her - it's about modeling vulnerability.
fear_of_getting_worse: <break time="400ms"/>I'm scared of getting worse. <break time="350ms"/>That fear never fully goes away.
<break time="350ms"/>Every new symptom, I wonder: <break time="300ms"/>is this the start of something bigger?
<break time="400ms"/>The uncertainty is sometimes harder than the symptoms. <break time="350ms"/>Not knowing what's coming.
fear_of_being_a_burden: <break time="350ms"/>I worry about being too much. <break time="300ms"/>Needing too much. <break time="250ms"/>Taking too much.
<break time="400ms"/>Sometimes I don't ask for help because I'm keeping score. <break time="350ms"/>Afraid I've used up my allowance.
<break time="350ms"/>The fear of being a burden makes me minimize. <break time="300ms"/>Say I'm fine when I'm not.
fear_of_being_forgotten: <break time="400ms"/>I worry that people will move on with their lives <break time="350ms"/>and forget I'm here. <break time="300ms"/>Stuck.
<break time="350ms"/>When I can't show up, I wonder if I'm fading from people's minds.
<break time="400ms"/>The world keeps moving. <break time="350ms"/>Sometimes I feel left behind.
fear_of_losing_identity: <break time="350ms"/>I don't want to be just my illness. <break time="300ms"/>But some days it feels like that's all I am.
<break time="400ms"/>I fear losing the parts of myself that aren't about being sick.
<break time="350ms"/>Who am I without the marathon runner? <break time="300ms"/>Without the person I was before?
fear_of_not_being_believed: <break time="400ms"/>Even now, I still fear not being believed. <break time="350ms"/>That wound goes deep.
<break time="350ms"/>Every time someone questions my symptoms, <break time="300ms"/>I feel that old fear rise up.
<break time="400ms"/>The three years of being dismissed... <break time="350ms"/>I'm still recovering from that.
